name: Nor Verner
description: The strongest, awakened by the System.

name: Orlan Void
description: Vice-Captain of the Ravenport Guild Branch and a relative of Opus Void. Easygoing and humorous on the surface, but far more intelligent and observant than most people realize.

name: Edora Grey
description: Captain of the Ravenport Guild Branch. Strict, elegant, and dependable.

name: Map
description: The map of the continent Nor is currently on

name: Klaus Miron
description: Klaus Miron is the ruler of the Miron Empire — a calm, intelligent, and terrifyingly composed man whose presence alone is enough to silence an entire room.

name: Chuck
description: Former elite cultivator of the Dormund Empire. Despite his advanced age, he remains an experienced fighter with exceptional combat instincts. After breaking through to Grand Master, his appearance became significantly younger.

name: Opus Void
description: Opus Void is the rector of the Main Academy and one of the most respected figures on the continent.

name: Icarus Daitron
description: Icarus Daitron — powerful, slightly impulsive woman, unpredictable but never truly careless.

name: Rodon
description: Rodon — legendary Overlord, killed by a stone thrown by Nor Verner.

name: Roy
description: Roy — The right hand of Emperor Klaus, hidden in the darkness.
